records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the Tiger of the Three Beasts?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the Tiger of the Three Beasts?

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cut the act.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cut the act.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cut the act.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like you've completely figured it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like you've completely figured it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like you've completely figured it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.


8vSo it's data corruption.





records.m_Talk_FRA: That's my guess too. It lines up with what you're going through.

8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wow
8v! So pretty!

Wow
8v! So pretty!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wow
8v! So pretty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There you are. I thought you'd be busy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There you are. I thought you'd be busy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There you are. I thought you'd be busy.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I placed an order with Nostalgia Workshop for fireworks the whole city can see. It
8ks not something you'd want to miss.

I placed an order with Nostalgia Workshop for fireworks the whole city can see. It
8ks not something you'd want to miss.

I placed an order with Nostalgia Workshop for fireworks the whole city can see. It
8ks not something you'd want to miss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a historic day, after all. The seasons have finally returned to the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a historic day, after all. The seasons have finally returned to the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a historic day, after all. The seasons have finally returned to the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThe impact of this Weather Control System won't be small.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThe impact of this Weather Control System won't be small.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThe impact of this Weather Control System won't be small.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This device is a bridge. For the one we're waiting for to find their way back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This device is a bridge. For the one we're waiting for to find their way back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This device is a bridge. For the one we're waiting for to find their way back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'd been afraid of the consequences, I'd never have started any of this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'd been afraid of the consequences, I'd never have started any of this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'd been afraid of the consequences, I'd never have started any of this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If your vision comes true, it'll be a beautiful reunion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If your vision comes true, it'll be a beautiful reunion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If your vision comes true, it'll be a beautiful reunion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're not someone who chases beautiful endings. You aim for the ideal ones. Even if it means turning a blind eye to tragedy to get your desired causality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're not someone who chases beautiful endings. You aim for the ideal ones. Even if it means turning a blind eye to tragedy to get your desired causality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're not someone who chases beautiful endings. You aim for the ideal ones. Even if it means turning a blind eye to tragedy to get your desired causality.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you saying the Supreme Administrator knew two dwarf stars would descend upon the world
8v and still chose not to stop it?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you saying the Supreme Administrator knew two dwarf stars would descend upon the world
8v and still chose not to stop it?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you saying the Supreme Administrator knew two dwarf stars would descend upon the world
8v and still chose not to stop it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feelings you left behind in me will come back to haunt you someday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feelings you left behind in me will come back to haunt you someday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feelings you left behind in me will come back to haunt you someday.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm sure you already expected that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'm sure you already expected that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm sure you already expected that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps. But you know as well as I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps. But you know as well as I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps. But you know as well as I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThere's no such thing as an unnecessary causality.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThere's no such thing as an unnecessary causality.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThere's no such thing as an unnecessary causality.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYou're more like a machine than an actual machine would ever be, you know that?
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYou're more like a machine than an actual machine would ever be, you know that?
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYou're more like a machine than an actual machine would ever be, you know that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feelings I choose to carry, I won't ask forgiveness for them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feelings I choose to carry, I won't ask forgiveness for them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feelings I choose to carry, I won't ask forgiveness for them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I hope you stay true to that resolve. To the very end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I hope you stay true to that resolve. To the very end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I hope you stay true to that resolve. To the very end.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
A beautiful reunion
8v I'd like that too.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
A beautiful reunion
8v I'd like that too.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
A beautiful reunion
8v I'd like that too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even if a miracle happens, those two are bound to go awry again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even if a miracle happens, those two are bound to go awry again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even if a miracle happens, those two are bound to go awry again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because fate waits for no one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because fate waits for no one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because fate waits for no one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good work. The records you brought back were thankfully intact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good work. The records you brought back were thankfully intact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good work. The records you brought back were thankfully intact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's the Tiger of the Three Beasts?

root.m_Talk_FRA: What's the Tiger of the Three Beasts?

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.


8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vStraight to the point. I'm pretty sure I warned you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's best not to pry into the Administration's classified material.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cut the act.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cut the act.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cut the act.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, didn't I? I can see a man's past with these eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know who you are, what you want, and that you've been looking for someone to help you get it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This job, this whole setup, was your way of making me cooperate. Wasn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like you've completely figured it out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like you've completely figured it out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like you've completely figured it out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, if you couldn't, I wouldn't have tried to recruit you in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That offer you made last time. It still stands, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That if I join you, I'll learn more about the man inside the Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like that look in your eyes. And I'll trust that your lips are just as sealed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Three Beasts are creatures from beyond this world, from a place called the Abyss.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
The Administration tried multiple times to hunt them down
8v and failed every time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when killed, the Beasts curse their slayers and use that curse to be reborn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration came up with all sorts of ways to contain the immortal Tiger. But it was only a matter of time before it started invading the Normalside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And then one day, the Tiger just vanished. Left no trace. Not even in the records.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vSo it's data corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vSo it's data corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vSo it's data corruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's my guess too. It lines up with what you're going through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's my guess too. It lines up with what you're going through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's my guess too. It lines up with what you're going through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if we can restore the memories lost due to that data corruption, we might be able to uncover the whereabouts of your <color=#ffd34c>family</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mean the Dark Eternium?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mean the Dark Eternium?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mean the Dark Eternium?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That lump of mineral
8v showed me a memory.

That lump of mineral
8v showed me a memory.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That lump of mineral
8v showed me a memory.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8v but I saw myself. And a man.

Could've been a hallucination
8v but I saw myself. And a man.

Could've been a hallucination
8v but I saw myself. And a man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in that place, I could see people's deaths with my eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in that place, I could see people's deaths with my eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in that place, I could see people's deaths with my eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An ability that's the complete opposite of what you have now. Peeking into other people's pasts.

root.m_Talk_FRA: An ability that's the complete opposite of what you have now. Peeking into other people's pasts.

Didn't I already tell you I wasn't peeking? If you hadn't pulled up my bangs back then
8v!

8v!

8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Help me, and you'll find more traces like that. Your lost memories will start coming back too.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Help me, and you'll find more traces like that. Your lost memories will start coming back too.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe even more than just your memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A lot of your plans don't really fit with how the Administration operates.

root.m_Talk_FRA: A lot of your plans don't really fit with how the Administration operates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, you're going to be branded a villain, not a hero. You'll have the whole world turn against you.

root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, you're going to be branded a villain, not a hero. You'll have the whole world turn against you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To realize that and still decide to help me, that must mean you're ready to take that risk too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Granny!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing? There's so much to see, and you've been staring at the ground this whole time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing? There's so much to see, and you've been staring at the ground this whole time.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Look at this! The flowers are so pretty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at this! The flowers are so pretty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pretty, right? I heard the Administration planted more than a hundred types just for this year's blooming festival. They're all flowers that only bloom in warm weather.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing. I've never seen so many flowers in one place.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what spring feels like.

root.m_Talk_FRA: And then this person from the Administration showed me a sword.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was stunned. It was exactly like the one the guy in my dream had.

root.m_Talk_FRA: If your vision comes true, it'll be a beautiful reunion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're not someone who chases beautiful endings. You aim for the ideal ones. Even if it means turning a blind eye to tragedy to get your desired causality.
